title: 2024 01 01 2023 Year Recap
html:
TL;DR

  • New Year's Day 2024 retrospective on 2023 — sophomore winter/spring → junior fall — answered against a 23-question template (big moments, wins, energy-givers, gratitude, growth, bottlenecks).
  • Major arcs: dating jo (Mar–Jul, "awkward escape room date" → Bend camping breakup), Portland summer internship at Occam, cross-country trip with cam jipp, a 2-week Middle East trip with David (saw two wonders of the world), Sam Solum arc starting in October.
  • Hardest moment of the year: Victor died in October — services in November, "crazy mixed feelings internally."
  • Biggest win: "first relationship," "most dialed-in health year," "rekindled connection with my brother." Biggest drain: "father being extremely draining," "questioning sexuality, ambitions, self-confidence," "drinking at a rate I never have before."
  • Best-of book: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow (made him cry). 5-year wish answered: "I have some motion with girls."

Notes

Month-by-month timeline is unusually rich — drops named people (Riley from Medford, paige, Kyle + Jenna breakup, emilio poker night, Sam Solum "first time" with Yahir's now-trademark blunt body-fact reporting) and named events (St Patty at Dinsdales, Ford event redux, surprising Riley in Idaho, OSU vs UW game, scholarship-comped Blazers game). Reads like the source material the would otherwise scatter across 50 individual notes.

The Victor death entry sits beside party logs without commentary — characteristic of Yahir's reflection style: he doesn't editorialize loss, he places it in the chronological row. The November bullet "crazy mixed feelings internally" is the closest he gets.

The bottleneck answer is "myself. Me not sending it on something that I want." Five-year action question: invest in a house for my mother, a retreat house for himself, experiences for his closest friends — direct precursor to the mom house mission that crystallizes in 2024.

Connections

  • end of chapter reflection — the genre
  • mom house by the river goal — the seed-line for what becomes Yahir's life mission
  • jo, sam, victor ruiz, cam jipp, paige, riley, emilio — the cast of 2023
  • occam advisors — the Portland internship
  • fear of not doing — the bottleneck-self framing
